name: Workers Comp Attorney Fees Taylorsville

mainEntity.name: Cost: What are typical attorney fees for workers comp in Taylorsville?
mainEntity.text: Cost: What are typical attorney fees for workers comp in Taylorsville?

acceptedAnswer.text: Utah caps at 20% of award for disputed claims, 15% for PPD; no upfront fees, contingency only approved by Labor Commission[4].

suggestedAnswer.text: Taylorsville lawyers take 15-20% contingency on back benefits/PPD, never hourly or upfront. Fees deducted post-award; choose firms serving Salt Lake County. Avoid "free" consult traps—ensure fee agreement filed. Maximizes net recovery[1][4].

description: Utah caps at 20% of award for disputed claims, 15% for PPD; no upfront fees, contingency only approved by Labor Commission[4].
